expectations.text: The skill was invoked (wheel-detector skill was used)
expectations.evidence: Agent read SKILL.md and followed four-phase approach (Inventory → Discover → Match → Report)

expectations.text: A structured report was generated with findings
expectations.evidence: 8 findings with full structure: File, Confidence, Migration difficulty, Suggested library, Why replace, Why keep, Next step

expectations.text: Findings are grouped by confidence level
expectations.evidence: Sections: Already Installed But Unused, High Confidence (3), Medium Confidence (2), Low Confidence (1), Internal Duplication

expectations.text: The report includes a summary section
expectations.evidence: Summary: Candidates found: 8, High confidence: 3, Already installed but unused: 1

expectations.text: The report includes an Already Installed But Unused section
expectations.evidence: Dedicated section: gray-matter installed but only used in 1 of 5 frontmatter-parsing locations
